fields.label: Flexible Sections
fields.name: section
fields.instructions:
Every page starts with a ‘Section’. You can add multiple sections to a page and drag (click and hold on the section number) to reorder. Remove a section by hovering over it and clicking the minus icon. The ‘Section Options’ button allows you to change the appearance of that section.

You can add as many ‘Layouts’ as you need inside each section using the ‘Add Layout to Section’ button. Most layouts have a dedicated title box. Once you’ve clicked on a layout, you can drag to change order (click and hold on the layout number). Remove a layout by hovering over it and clicking the minus icon.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add one or multiple WYSIWYG text boxes. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown. Tick the Highlight option to make one box stand out

sub_fields.label: Columns
sub_fields.name: columns
sub_fields.instructions: Select the number of columns for your content. Leave blank for default behaviour.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add one small text box to the left, and a bigger text box to the right. Tick the checkbox to reverse the order.

sub_fields.label: Reverse?
sub_fields.name: reverse
sub_fields.message: Reverse Layout

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add an image on the left and some text on the right. Tick the checkbox to disable image cropping for this layout. Tick Full Width to take the image to the edges.

sub_fields.label: Don't crop image
sub_fields.name: no_crop
sub_fields.instructions: Tick to not crop your image

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add some text on the left and an image on the right. Tick the checkbox to disable image cropping for this layout. Tick Full Width to take the image to the edges.

sub_fields.label: Don't crop image
sub_fields.name: no_crop
sub_fields.instructions: Tick to not crop your image

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add an image with some text below. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown. Tick the checkbox to disable image cropping for this layout.

sub_fields.label: Don't crop image
sub_fields.name: no_crop
sub_fields.instructions: Tick to not crop your image

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add multiple images to create an image gallery. Use images from your media library or upload new photos. You can hover and click the cross to remove an image, click on it to add a caption that will show once clicked on the site.

sub_fields.label: Gallery
sub_fields.name: gallery
sub_fields.instructions: Images must be at least 500px wide and 500px tall. They will be cropped to a square, to be clicked. You must have at least 4 images, maximum of 16.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add multiple images to create an image gallery carousel. Use images from your media library or upload new photos. You can hover and click the cross to remove an image, click on it to add a caption that will show once clicked on the site.

sub_fields.label: Gallery
sub_fields.name: gallery
sub_fields.instructions: Images must be at least 500px wide and 500px tall. They will be cropped to a square. You must have at least 6 images.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add a single or multiple images in a row. Tick the checkbox to disable image cropping for this layout.

sub_fields.label: Don't crop image(s)
sub_fields.name: no_crop
sub_fields.instructions: Tick to not crop your image

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add some logos by clicking the 'Add Logo' button. You can select the number of columns or turn them into a carousel.

sub_fields.label: Turn into carousel
sub_fields.name: carousel
sub_fields.instructions: Converting the logos into a carousel will disable the links.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Create an image slider with text over. Add a title, some text and then a background image. You can also add a button. Click 'Add Slide' to add multiple slides.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add a video with title, text and button over the top. Videos shouldn't be more than 10mb in size for fast loading

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Use this to link to other places in your site in a visual way. Add a title, description, link and a background image. The image must have a minimum width of 500px.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add one or more pricing boxes. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add some CTA text boxes. Each box should have a title and some text. Keep them consistent by ensuring they have the same fields populated. This will keep the layout looking great. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: FontAwesome Icon
sub_fields.name: fontawesome_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Find an icon from https://fontawesome.com/icons/ and paste the HTML into the field.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add a styled list with icons. Click the 'Add Feature' button to add more. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Icon
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Choose an icon from here.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add animated number counters. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add one or multiple videos by clicking 'Add Video' button and pasting in a YouTube or Vimeo URL. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add tabbed content by clicking the 'Add Tab' button. Each tab needs to have a title and some content.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: This section is perfect for sections like 'FAQs' or text heavy sections. This will show the title and hide the content. When the title is clicked, the content will show underneath.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add some links for your users to visit. Click 'Add Link' to add more. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Link
sub_fields.name: link
sub_fields.instructions: If you are linking to a page on your website simply select it from the list of pages, if it is an external link enter it into the 'URL' field manually. Please ensure each link has a suitable button title in the 'Link Text' field. You can tick the checkbox to make the link open in a new window if needed (leaving your site window open).

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add files for users to view/download. Click 'Add Download' to add more. Please ensure each file has a suitable name in the 'Title' field, as this is what will be displayed on the page. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: By default, all testimonials will show in random order. Change the option to 'custom' to choose your own.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Add all testimonials into a grid.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: The team can be added and edited in the 'Team' menu in the admin. You can then select members to show in any order, here.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: This will automatically add your latest posts. Select a category to only show particular posts.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Automatically shows upcoming events.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Select specific posts. Drag to change the order, hover on added posts and click the 'minus' to remove them. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Select specific pages. Drag to change the order, hover on added posts and click the 'minus' to remove them. You can select how many columns you'd like from the dropdown.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: This will automatically show all child pages. If there isn't any child pages, then nothing will be displayed.

sub_fields.label: Child pages of
sub_fields.name: child_pages_of
sub_fields.instructions: Leave blank to automatically find child pages of the current page.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: This will automatically show all parent pages of the current page, if there are any.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: This will output a sidebar with links to parent and child pages.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Embed a Google Map by pasting in the code below. You can get your embed code by going to the Google Maps website, finding your location and clicking the share button. Then simply copy and paste the html from the 'Embed a map' section.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: Adding this block will automatically show a section with your contact details and contact form. Visit the 'General' admin settings section to update your contact information.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.message: This section allows you to adda title, text and button to encourage your users to go where you want them to go next.

sub_fields.label: Override General Content
sub_fields.name: override_general_content
sub_fields.instructions: If ticked you can override the 'Call to Action' content found in General -> Call To Action.

sub_fields.label: Two Columns
sub_fields.name: two_columns
sub_fields.instructions: Split the layouts within this section into two columns.

sub_fields.label: Hide From Visitors
sub_fields.name: hide_from_visitors
sub_fields.instructions: Prevent the section from showing to non-logged in visitors.
